archetype: Performance Pro blended with Swiss Clarity

components.button_primary: background: var(--gradient-primary); color: #fff; padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Poppins'; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px 0 rgba(37,99,235,0.39); border: none; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
components.button_outline: background: transparent; color: var(--primary); padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Poppins'; transition: all 0.2s; border: 2px solid var(--primary); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
components.card: background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--surface-border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: 2.5rem 2rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); transition: transform 0.3s ease; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
components.navbar: position: sticky; top: 0; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--surface-border); z-index: 100; height: 80px; display: flex; align-items: center;
components.form_input: width: 100%; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border: 1.5px solid var(--surface-border); border-radius: var(--border-radius-small); font-family: 'Inter'; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-main); transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; background: #fff;
components.marquee: overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; background: var(--secondary); color: var(--primary_dark); padding: 1.5rem 0; font-family: 'Poppins'; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--surface-border); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--surface-border);

media.icons_strategy: Use FontAwesome via CDN (<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">). DO NOT use emojis.

sections.name: Navbar
sections.details: Sticky top bar. Logo on left (height ~48px). Center links: 'Programs', 'Process', 'Success Stories'. Right: 'Join Now' CTA button. Clean, generous spacing.

sections.name: Hero
sections.details: High visual impact 2-column layout. Left: Massive H1 typography (Poppins Black), e.g. 'Transform Your Body & Health'. Highlight words with primary blue. Subtext addressing busy professionals & PCOS/Thyroid. Primary button to '#lead-form'. Right: Trainer image. Add subtle blue gradient blobs as background decorative elements.

sections.name: Marquee Ticker
sections.details: CSS keyframe infinite scroll. Text items: 'Fat Loss', 'Muscle Gain', 'PCOS Management', 'Diabetes Reversal', 'Lifestyle Transformation', separated by stars or FontAwesome icons.

sections.name: Problem / Who It's For (Feature Cards)
sections.details: CSS Grid (3 columns). White cards with blue icon, heading, and text. Addresses struggles: Lack of time, stubborn fat, medical conditions.

sections.name: Step-by-Step Process
sections.details: Vertical timeline or 3-step horizontal grid. Step 1: Assessment, Step 2: Custom Plan, Step 3: 1-on-1 Check-ins. Use large typography numbers ('01', '02', '03') in light blue (`var(--secondary)`).

sections.name: Program Discovery / Services
sections.details: Use feature images. Layout similar to class discovery. Image top, content bottom. 'Fat Loss Program', 'Medical Condition Management', 'Muscle Building'.

sections.name: Offer / Lead Form
sections.details: Split section. Left: 'Start Your Transformation Today' with bullet points of what they get. Right: Clean white card containing HTML form. Inputs for Name, Email, Phone, Goal (select dropdown). Large submit button. Must include Meta Pixel logic stub in JS.

sections.name: Footer
sections.details: Deep Blue or simple White layout. Logo, copyright, 'Designed for ATF'.

technical_requirements.css: Use custom CSS properties at `:root` in `style.css`. Implement Grid/Flexbox. Use standard CSS media queries for responsiveness. DO NOT USE TAILWIND OR ANY FRAMEWORK. Pure CSS only.
technical_requirements.javascript: Vanilla JS in `script.js` for: mobile menu toggle, sticky nav shadow on scroll, marquee pause on hover, form submission simulation (prevent default, redirect to `thankyou.html`). Include a dummy Meta Pixel script.
technical_requirements.html: Semantic tags. Must include Google Fonts links for Poppins and Inter. FontAwesome for icons.
technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, form submit) MUST have `data-testid` attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement `index.html`, `thankyou.html`, `style.css`, and `script.js`. Strict requirement: PURE HTML, CSS, JS ONLY. No React, no Tailwind, no libraries. All CSS must go in `style.css`. Create an ultra-premium layout matching the white + blue + gradient scheme, adapting the 'RAGA' app inspiration. Ensure strong contrast and generous spacing.
